channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: After the milestone was first wiped out by an offsides review, MacKinnon finally earns 1,000th point
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Nathan MacKinnon appeared to have reached the 1,000-point milestone in the first period of Colorado's game against Chicago. His teammates even streamed onto the ice to celebrate his history-making assist. That turned out to be just a dress rehearsal.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Luka, Lakers frustrated with officiating and themselves in a rough first game without LeBron James
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — LeBron James sat on the end of the Lakers' bench, wearing a red baseball cap while watching his team in the first game since his groin injury. The red on the court Monday night was in Luka Doncic's face, frustrated by his rocky play and angry with the officiating.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Ex-Yankees pitcher Schallock, who once replaced Mickey Mantle on roster, dies at 100
item.description: The Bay Area native went to Tamalpais High in Mill Valley then College of Marin before becoming the 10,823rd major league player when he debuted on July 16, 1951.
item.dc:creator: Janie McCauley, The Mercury News

item.title: Paige Bueckers and UConn are healthy and rolling as her final March Madness approaches
item.description: UNCASVILLE, Conn. (AP) — Paige Bueckers is in a class by herself in the Big East, becoming the first player to win the most outstanding player of the conference tournament three times.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Southwestern League basketball All-Conference teams announced
item.description: It was a wild season filled with buzzer-beaters and many other incredible moments, as we congratulate the great players honored on this year's Southwestern League All-Conference Teams.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Jets and QB Justin Fields agree to a 2-year, $40 million deal, AP source says
item.description: Justin Fields was passed over by the New York Jets four years ago in the NFL draft. Now he's expected to be their No. 1 quarterback. Fields and the Jets agreed Monday to a two-year contract worth $40 million, a person with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: The 49ers lose several key players on the opening day of free agency
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — The opening of free agency for the San Francisco 49ers was more about their losses than their additions.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eagles 'enthusiastically accepted' President Trump's White House invite after Super Bowl win, official says
item.description: The Philadelphia Eagles have "enthusiastically accepted" President Trump's White House invite to celebrate the team's Super Bowl LIX victory.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Saunders earns first team All-Big 12 honors
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Fresh off leading No. 17 BYU to its eighth straight win on Saturday, Richie Saunders was named the Big 12 Most Improved Player and claimed First Team All-Big honors. Egor Demin earned honorable mention all-conference and all-freshman accolades.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Texans trade 5-time Pro Bowler Laremy Tunsil to Commanders: reports
item.description: Washington Commanders get a strong blindside protector for Jayden Daniels, dealing with the Houston Texans for five-time Pro Bowl left tackle Laremy Tunsil.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Report: Bears sign DE Dayo Odeyingbo to 3-year deal
item.description: LAKE FOREST, Ill. — The Bears have signed defensive end Dayo Odeyingbo to a three-year deal, according to NFL insider Ian Rapoport. The 25-year-old was a second-round pick by the Colts in 2021 and addresses a need the team had on the defensive line.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Justin Fields agrees to 2-year deal with Jets: reports
item.description: The New York Jets have a new starting quarterback, as Justin Fields, the ex-Chicago Bears and Pittsburgh Steelers signal caller, agreed to a 2-year deal.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: First and last spots in March Madness riding on outcome of conference tournaments
item.description: The first spot and last spot in the NCAA Tournament are riding on what happens in conference tournaments this week. Auburn had been No. 1 the past two months, but competitive losses to Texas A&M and Alabama — the latter on a buzzer-beater in overtime — last week dropped the Tigers to No.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Huge Caitlin Clark milestone surpassed by teen phenom JuJu Watkins amid quest to steal all-time scoring crown
item.description: JuJu Watkins surpassed one of Caitlin Clark's biggest milestones on Sunday, moving past Clark's mark for points scored by a player across their first two seasons.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Verstappen bids for 5th title and Hamilton's at Ferrari as F1 prepares for a close fight in 2025
item.description: Lando Norris will have to defy plenty of history to win the Formula 1 title this year. There's his friend-turned-rival Max Verstappen's bid for a fifth title in a row.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ELLINGWORTH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cavaliers rely on scoring balance to beat Bucks 112-100 for 14th consecutive victory
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Max Strus had 17 points to lead a balanced scoring attack as the NBA-leading Cleveland Cavaliers defeated the Milwaukee Bucks 112-100 on Sunday night for their 14th consecutive victory.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: DK Metcalf traded to Steelers, agrees to 5-year deal as Seahawks fulfill disgruntled star's wish: reports
item.description: The Pittsburgh Steelers have traded for D.K. Metcalf, and signed the Seattle Seahawks star receiver to a five-year, $150 million contract to keep him long-term, per multiple reports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Myles Garrett becomes highest-paid non-quarterback in NFL history
item.description: Garrett, the 2023 AP Defensive Player of the Year, had asked for a trade last month but the Browns were adamant about keeping the 29-year-old star in Cleveland.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Kenwood Academy girls basketball team brings IHSA Class 4A state title back to South Side for 1st time in program history
item.description: NOTE: The attached video is from a feature story by GN Sports' Josh Frydman on the Kenwood Academy boys and girls basketball programs prior to the IHSA State Girls Basketball Tournament over the weekend.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Soldier Field to host Premier League doubleheader this summer
item.description: The Premier League Summer Series is coming to Chicago this summer, featuring four Premier League clubs - AFC Bournemouth, Everton, Manchester United, and West Ham United - in a doubleheader at Soldier Field on Wednesday, July 30.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: BYU pulls away from Utah for 8th straight win, 85-74
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU basketball team is rolling into the postseason. Dawson Baker scored 15 points and Richie Saunders added 14 to lead No. 23 BYU to an 85-74 victory over rival Utah on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Warriors star Stephen Curry reaches 25,000 career points
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Stephen Curry became the 26th player in NBA history to score 25,000 career points, reaching the milestone during the third quarter of the Golden State Warriors' 115-110 victory over the Detroit Pistons on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: RSL gives up two stoppage time goals in 3-1 loss
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - After jumping out to an early lead, Real Salt Lake allowed three straight goals, two in stoppage time, and loses in its first meeting with San Diego FC Saturday night at America First Field, 3-1.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah Valley clinches WAC regular season title
item.description: STEPHENVILLE, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - Dominick Nelson matched a career high with 25 points, and Carter Welling added 18 as Utah Valley defeated Tarleton State 71-66 in a sold-out Wisdom Gym on Saturday night, closing out WAC play with a statement win.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Stamkos finishes 14th career hat trick in OT to give Predators 3-2 win over Blackhawks
item.description: Steven Stamkos scored at 2:39 of overtime to complete his 14th career hat trick and the Nashville Predators beat the Chicago Blackhawks 3-2 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Tatum scores 40, Celtics beat Lakers 111-101 after James leaves late with groin injury
item.description: Jayson Tatum had 40 points, 12 rebounds, and eight assists, and the Boston Celtics held off a late rally to beat the Los Angeles Lakers 111-101 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Daytona 500 winner William Byron claims NASCAR Cup pole
item.description: On Saturday, Daytona 500 winner William Byron claimed the Busch Light pole during the 312-mile race at Phoenix Raceway. According to NASCAR, it's the 14th pole of the 27 year-old's career.
item.dc:creator: Russell Falcon, Fox 5

item.title: Aggies dominate Air Force in regular season finale
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Mason Falslev scored 18 points on 8-of-10 shooting to lead the Utah State basketball team to a dominating 87-47 win over Air Force. The Aggies had lost two in a row for the first time all year, but gave their fans plenty to cheer about in their home finale.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah keeps rolling with 4-2 victory at Detroit
item.description: DETROIT (ABC4 Sports) - Karel Vejmelka made 38 saves for the Utah Hockey Club, who scored three straight goals to rally for a 4-2 win against the Detroit Red Wings at Little Caesars Arena on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Gerlinde Kaltenbrunner climbed the world's 14 highest peaks without oxygen or porters
item.description: Gerlinde Kaltenbrunner, an Austrian-born mountaineer, became the first woman to climb the world's 14 highest peaks without the help of oxygen or porters.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5
